translations.vi: Cửa hàng hôm nay đóng cửa.

tokens.explanation: Definite article elided before a vowel-initial noun; marks definiteness, masculine singular, agreeing with 'établissement'.
Common noun; head of the subject NP.
Copular verb, 3rd person singular present; links the subject to the predicate adjective.
Past participle used as a predicate adjective; agrees in gender/number with the subject (masculine singular here).
Temporal adverb specifying the time frame.

sentences.target: Je travaille dans cet établissement depuis trois ans.
sentences.reading: /ʒə tʁavaj dɑ̃ sɛt etablismɑ̃ dəpɥi tʁwazɑ̃/

translations.fr: Je travaille dans cet établissement depuis trois ans.
translations.ipa: /ʒə tʁavaj dɑ̃ sɛt etablismɑ̃ dəpɥi tʁwazɑ̃/
translations.en: I've worked at this establishment for three years.
translations.es: Trabajo en esta institución desde hace tres años.
translations.de: Ich arbeite seit drei Jahren in dieser Einrichtung.
translations.it: Lavoro in questo istituto da tre anni.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在这家机构工作了三年。
translations.yue: 我喺呢間機構做咗三年嘢。
translations.ru: Я работаю в этом учреждении уже три года.
translations.pt: Trabalho nesta instituição há três anos.
translations.he: אני עובדת במוסד הזה כבר שלוש שנים.
translations.vi: Tôi đã làm việc ở cơ sở này được ba năm.
translations.ar: أعمل في هذه المؤسسة منذ ثلاث سنوات.
translations.nl: Ik werk al drie jaar bij deze instelling.
translations.uk: Я працюю в цьому закладі вже три роки.
translations.hu: Három éve dolgozom ebben az intézményben.
translations.hi: मैं इस संस्थान में तीन साल से काम कर रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Pracuję w tej instytucji od trzech lat.
translations.el: Εργάζομαι σε αυτό το ίδρυμα εδώ και τρία χρόνια.
translations.nb: Jeg har jobbet ved denne institusjonen i tre år.
translations.id: Saya sudah bekerja di institusi ini selama tiga tahun.
translations.sv: Jag har arbetat på den här institutionen i tre år.
translations.ro: Lucrez în această instituție de trei ani.
translations.cs: Už tři roky pracuji v této instituci.
translations.da: Jeg har arbejdet på denne institution i tre år.
translations.fi: Olen työskennellyt tässä laitoksessa kolme vuotta.
translations.ja: 私はこの施設で三年間働いています。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun.
Main verb, 1st person singular present; denotes ongoing action.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular, used before a vowel sound to specify a particular referent.
Common noun serving as the object of the preposition 'dans'.
Preposition introducing duration or starting point of the action.
Cardinal numeral modifying 'ans'.
Common time noun (plural here); measure complement governed by 'depuis'.

sentences.target: On choisit un établissement vraiment tranquille.

translations.fr: On choisit un établissement vraiment tranquille.
translations.en: We're picking a really quiet establishment.
translations.es: Estamos eligiendo un lugar muy tranquilo.
translations.de: Wir wählen ein wirklich ruhiges Lokal.
translations.it: Stiamo scegliendo un locale davvero tranquillo.
translations.ko: 우리는 정말 조용한 곳을 고르고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在选一家非常安静的店。
translations.yue: 我哋揀緊一間好靜嘅舖。
translations.pt: Estamos escolhendo um lugar bem tranquilo.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang chọn một chỗ thật yên tĩnh.
translations.nl: We kiezen een heel rustige plek.
translations.hi: हम एक बहुत शांत जगह चुन रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi velger et virkelig rolig sted.
translations.id: Kami sedang memilih tempat yang benar-benar tenang.
translations.sv: Vi väljer ett riktigt lugnt ställe.
translations.ro: Alegem un loc cu adevărat liniștit.
translations.da: Vi vælger et virkelig roligt sted.
translations.ja: 私たちは本当に静かな店を選んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/colloquial subject pronoun (3rd person singular) meaning 'we/one'.
Main verb, 3rd person singular present; transitive.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, introducing a new referent.
Common noun functioning as the direct object of 'choisit'.
Degree adverb modifying the adjective 'tranquille'.
Attributive adjective modifying 'établissement'.

sentences.target: Tu connais cet établissement près du parc.
sentences.reading: /ty kɔnɛ sɛt etablismɑ̃ pʁɛ dy paʁk/

translations.fr: Tu connais cet établissement près du parc.
translations.ipa: /ty kɔnɛ sɛt etablismɑ̃ pʁɛ dy paʁk/
translations.en: You know this establishment near the park.
translations.es: Conoces ese local cerca del parque.
translations.de: Du kennst dieses Lokal in der Nähe des Parks.
translations.it: Conosci quel locale vicino al parco.
translations.ko: 너는 공원 근처에 있는 그 가게를 알고 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 你知道公园附近那家店。
translations.pt: Você conhece aquele lugar perto do parque.
translations.he: אתה מכיר את המקום הזה ליד הפארק.
translations.vi: Bạn biết chỗ đó gần công viên.
translations.ar: أنت تعرف ذلك المكان قرب الحديقة.
translations.nl: Je kent die zaak bij het park.
translations.uk: Ти знаєш той заклад біля парку.
translations.hu: Ismered azt a helyet a park közelében.
translations.hi: तुम पार्क के पास वाले उस जगह को जानते हो.
translations.el: Ξέρεις εκείνο το μαγαζί κοντά στο πάρκο.
translations.nb: Du kjenner det stedet ved parken.
translations.id: Kamu tahu tempat itu dekat taman.
translations.sv: Du känner till stället nära parken.
translations.da: Du kender det sted ved parken.
translations.ja: 公園の近くのあの店を知っている。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun.
Main verb, 2nd person singular present; transitive.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular, used before a vowel sound.
Common noun functioning as the direct object of 'connais'.
Adverb forming the complex preposition 'près de' indicating proximity.
Preposition 'de' contracted with the definite article 'le'; introduces the noun complement after 'près'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'du'.
